pharmacy_partner: Grace Health Pharmacy — In-house and partnered with Walgreens, CVS
refill_request_channels: Telehealth visit for controlled substances requiring new prescription

policies.refill_process: Patient or pharmacy can request refill via MyGrace portal, pharmacy fax, or call center. Provider will review within 2 business days. Allow 48–72 hours for processing.
policies.requires_visit: Only if no visit in the past 12 months or if patient reports a significant change in symptoms.
policies.early_refill: Most plans allow refill when 75% of supply is used. Check your insurance formulary.

policies.refill_process: NEW PRESCRIPTION required for every fill. Cannot be called in or faxed in most states. Patient must have an in-person or eligible telehealth visit. Prescriptions issued electronically (EPCS).
policies.requires_visit: YES — required by federal law (DEA Schedule II). Visit must be within 30 days.
policies.early_refill: Not permitted. Law prohibits early fills for Schedule II substances.

policies.refill_process: Provider may authorize up to 5 refills within 6 months. Patient must have an active treatment relationship. Telehealth prescribing rules apply (DEA 2024 regulations).
policies.requires_visit: Visit required at least every 6 months. More frequent visits may be required based on clinical judgment.
policies.early_refill: Cannot be filled more than 2 days early in most cases. Lost or stolen controlled substances: police report required.

policies.refill_process: Can be requested through MyGrace portal or pharmacy. Provider review within 24 hours for patients with active diabetes diagnosis.
policies.requires_visit: Annual visit required. A1C monitoring recommended every 3 months.
policies.early_refill: Covered per insurance plan. Prior auth may be needed for newer analogs.

policies.refill_process: Managed through Grace Health Specialty Pharmacy at 555-400-8500. Prior authorization typically required and renewed annually.
policies.requires_visit: Visit schedule varies by drug and diagnosis. Care coordinator will manage proactively.
policies.early_refill: Contact specialty pharmacy — managed on a case-by-case basis.

ai_response_guidance.general_refill_request: I can help request a refill for a non-controlled medication. Can you tell me the name of the medication and your date of birth so I can pull up your record? Controlled substances require a provider visit — I can schedule that for you.
ai_response_guidance.controlled_substance_request: I understand you need a refill for [medication]. Because this is a controlled substance, our provider is required to see you before issuing a new prescription. I can schedule a telehealth or in-person appointment for you — which would you prefer?
ai_response_guidance.urgent_medication_need: If you're running critically low on a life-sustaining medication like insulin or a heart medication, please let me know and I will flag this as urgent for our pharmacy team and provider. Please do not abruptly stop any chronic medication without speaking to your provider.
